tables.title: Asthma: Current GINA Step Framework vs. Legacy Phase Language
rows: Resolves spontaneously or with bronchodilators within 1-2 hours
Symptoms <3-5 days/week, normal/slightly reduced lung function
Does not respond to bronchodilators alone; needs anti-inflammatory treatment
Symptoms most days, night waking ≥1x/week, or reduced lung function
More refractory, escalating severity toward respiratory compromise
Daily symptoms, night waking ≥1x/week, low lung function, or recent exacerbation
Severe, treatment-refractory presentation approaching respiratory failure
